ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "content_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the content type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the content type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon associated with the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_items" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content type of the item */,
  "object_repr" TEXT /* Representation of the content item (e.g., URL, title) */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Parent content item ID (for hierarchical structures) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the content item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content item was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content item (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_items_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES content_items ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_items_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email address has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., create, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
